items.reason: No verified email address is stored in the current source set.
items.impact: Email-based support or footer contact cannot be exposed truthfully.
items.recommendedAction: Confirm an email address from a verified first-party source before publishing it.

items.reason: No verified first-party website URL is currently stored.
items.impact: Canonical identity and visit-website conversion remain unavailable.
items.recommendedAction: Capture the official website once it is verified.

items.reason: No verified order link is stored.
items.impact: Order-led conversion cannot be used as a truthful primary CTA.
items.recommendedAction: Add a real ordering URL only after it is confirmed.

items.reason: No verified external menu URL is stored.
items.impact: Menu discovery depends on the landing page content only.
items.recommendedAction: Capture a reliable public menu URL if one exists.

items.reason: No WhatsApp route has been verified.
items.recommendedAction: Only add WhatsApp if the business actively uses it for customer contact.

items.reason: Exact coordinates are not stored in the dataset.
items.impact: Schema and map integrations cannot publish precise geo coordinates.
items.recommendedAction: Capture latitude and longitude from a verified listing.

items.reason: Opening hours are not stored in the dataset.
items.impact: Schema, footer, and contact sections cannot expose trading hours.
items.recommendedAction: Add verified opening hours when they are available.

items.reason: Secondary categories are currently shaped for reuse rather than copied from a canonical listing.
items.impact: Fine for internal modeling, but not ideal as a verified taxonomy source.
items.recommendedAction: Confirm or replace with categories from a trusted listing when available.

items.reason: No curated direct testimonial quotes are stored yet.
items.impact: Trust can rely on rating and proof points, but not on quoted voices.
items.recommendedAction: Capture two or three short, verified quotes before using testimonial cards.
